suggested_policy_lever: Mandatory early-semester (week 4-6) grade check-ins; automatic tutoring referral on low approval/evaluation rate (t1).
(unclassified features -- inspect individually before assigning a lever).
Front-load scholarship/aid decisions & payment-plan offers before term start (t0); flag debtors for proactive outreach.
Course-level advising capacity planning; first-generation / low-parental-education student mentoring programs (t0).
Bridge/remedial modules for students admitted with weak prior grades, assigned before classes begin (t0).
Targeted (not diagnostic) outreach for older / displaced / part-time-coded students during orientation (t0) -- context, not a control lever.
Composite risk-score dashboards for advisors, refreshed each horizon, to prioritise caseloads (t0-t2).
